summary: Iteration 27: Tested new Professional Resume Templates feature. All 9 test cases passed. Resume Builder now has 8 steps with photo upload in Step 1, hobbies in Step 6, and template selection in Step 7. Three new professional templates (Professional/lavender, Corporate Blue, Clean Minimal) with photo requirement validation working correctly.
passed_tests: Resume Builder: 8 steps displayed (Personal Info, Summary, Experience, Education, Skills, More, Template, Preview)
Resume Builder: Photo upload section in Personal Info step with 'Required for Professional templates' text
Resume Builder: Hobbies & Interests section in More step with 'Optional: Add hobbies for Professional templates' text
Resume Builder: Template selection shows all 11 templates (8 original + 3 new professional)
Resume Builder: 3 new professional templates found (professional, professional-blue, professional-minimal)
Resume Builder: 3 'Requires photo' indicators shown on professional templates
Resume Builder: Error toast 'Please upload a photo first (Step 1) for this template' shown when selecting Professional template without photo
Resume Builder: Tip message about uploading photo displayed in Template step
Resume Builder: Preview step renders correctly with export buttons (DOCX, PDF)
critical_code_review_comments: Code structure is clean - VISUAL_TEMPLATES constant in constants.js is shared between Resume Builder and Resume Optimizer
ProfessionalTemplate component properly handles all 3 template variations with different color schemes
ResumePreview correctly routes to ProfessionalTemplate for professional/professional-blue/professional-minimal IDs
Photo validation in Template step prevents selection of professional templates without photo upload
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 27 verified Professional Resume Templates feature: (1) Resume Builder has 8 steps with Template step between More and Preview. (2) Photo upload in Step 1 with file input accepting images. (3) Hobbies field in Step 6 (More) with tag-style input. (4) Template selection in Step 7 shows all 11 templates including 3 new professional ones with 'Requires photo' indicators. (5) Professional templates require photo - error toast shown if selected without photo. (6) ResumePreview component routes to ProfessionalTemplate for professional/professional-blue/professional-minimal IDs. (7) Resume Optimizer page accessible at /resume-optimizer (not /resume-ai) and uses same VISUAL_TEMPLATES constant.

photo_upload.description: Profile Photo section with 'Required for Professional templates' text

hobbies_field.description: Hobbies & Interests section with tag-style input

photo_validation.error_toast: Please upload a photo first (Step 1) for this template
photo_validation.tip_message: Upload a photo in Step 1 to unlock Professional templates with two-column layout and skill bars

notes: Resume Optimizer page (/resume-optimizer) uses same VISUAL_TEMPLATES constant from constants.js, so new templates are available there as well. The template selector in Resume Optimizer appears after uploading a resume and going through analysis steps.
